Does your “crypto” project dismantle or amplify existing systems of inequality? If it doesn’t actively take special precautions it will fall into the latter as “default” because of the insidious way these systems self-perpetuate
I think about this paper at least once a week since I read it a year ago https://t.co/8opYqkhocK

As we learn the mechanisms that systems of inequality use to perpetuate themselves, we can choose to not take part of them and instead focus on maximizing human autonomy for every living person we share the world with in the systems we build (every single one) https://t.co/PE7D1YJbRt https://t.co/ZHgQ6RcsXK
